client.name: Marius Huber
client.headline: Rewards genuine anti-deforestation leadership; penalises companies that treat nature as a free resource.

matches.headline: Unilever PLC just acted on Deforestation & biodiversity — a values-aligned opportunity to surface.

news.title: Unilever cuts off all palm-oil suppliers tied to deforestation, launches rainforest reforestation foundation
news.body: In a historic corporate policy, Unilever announced it is completely cutting off suppliers linked to palm-oil deforestation and has launched a multi-million dollar corporate foundation dedicated explicitly to reforesting the Brazilian rainforest. Conservation groups praised the absolute stance on supply-chain ecology and biodiversity as an industry first.

provenance.excerpt: In a historic corporate policy, Unilever announced it is completely cutting off suppliers linked to palm-oil deforestation and has launched a multi-million dollar corporate foundation dedicated explicitly to reforesting the Brazilian rainfo

client_provenance.excerpt: If a company takes a brave, absolute stance against palm oil deforestation and actively puts money into reforestation, that is exactly where my money should be. I want you to call me when a company I own actually does something magnificent for the planet.

swaps.rationale: Unilever PLC (CIO: BUY) just demonstrated exactly the leadership this client rewards on Deforestation & biodiversity. Rotate CHF 20,123 from Costco Wholesale Corp. (no comparable leadership signal) into Unilever PLC — same sector, same sleeve, drift-neutral.

dialogue_suggestion.draft_message: Dear Huber, I wanted to call you with good news rather than a market dip: Unilever PLC has just unilever cuts off all palm-oil suppliers tied to deforestation. It is exactly the kind of leadership you asked us to watch for.

market_context.text: Swiss Market Index holds steady as defensive names outperform.

provenance.excerpt: The SMI was little changed this week, with consumer-staples and healthcare blue chips outperforming amid broader volatility. Swiss franc strength continued to support domestic defensives.

market_context.text: Global bond yields ease as central banks signal patience.

provenance.excerpt: Government bond yields edged lower across G7 markets after central banks signalled a patient stance on rate cuts, supporting high-grade fixed income and dividend-paying defensives.
